channel.title: Mall on Dyson Sphere Program Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Mall on Dyson Sphere Program Guide

item.title: Build a Mall in 30 Minutes - Never Hand-Craft a Building Again (DSP Guide)
item.description:
Hand-crafting buildings is the #1 time waste in DSP. You spend 20 minutes crafting assemblers, belts, and sorters when you should be designing production lines.

Here is how to build a mall - a factory that produces every building automatically, so you never craft by hand again. Before starting a mall, make sure your starter automation is producing gears, coils, and circuits reliably - a mall needs a steady supply of these components to function.
